summary: Completed the next unchecked Stage-1 ExecPlan item (interval math helpers). Added `src/tokens/intervals.py` for melodic/harmonic/reference interval helpers with QA vs production behavior, integrated it into `src/tokens/eventizer.py` (production repairs out-of-range melodic intervals by re-anchoring to preserve pitch reconstruction and logs repair counts), and updated `src/tokens/validator.py` to use shared harmonic math. Added `tests/test_intervals.py` for helper behavior and eventizer QA/production repair coverage. Updated `docs/exec/EXECPLAN_stage1.md` (item 2 checked), `TODO.md` (interval item checked), and appended a new entry to `PROGRESS.md`.
next_step: Implement the next unchecked ExecPlan item: event parsing/serialization in `src/tokens/tokenizer.py` with canonical ordering.
